summary: IDF reported multiple strikes against Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon and a raid in Beirut's Shuwayfat area. Iran launched a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, violating a cease‑fire, and deployed drones near the Strait of Hormuz. A Palestinian girl was killed in Gaza by an Israeli missile, highlighting civilian casualties.
key_points: IDF struck over 135 Hezbollah targets in the past 24 hours, including launch sites in Beka'a and southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/23932).
Two IDF soldiers were lightly wounded by Hezbollah anti‑tank fire in southern Lebanon (Source: @inon_yttach/8362).
Iran fired a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, breaching the cease‑fire, after earlier launching five drones near the Strait of Hormuz (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
Israeli forces conducted a strike in Beirut, reported to have hit the Shuwayfat area south of the capital (Source: @manniefabian/58303).
A Palestinian girl in Gaza was killed when an Israeli missile struck her building, killing 10 and injuring dozens (Source: @presstv/191707).
Hezbollah anti‑tank fire killed a Israeli drone operator in the western Galilee (Source: @inon_yttach/8367).
Israeli troops entered near Tel al‑Jala in the Quneitra countryside of southern Syria (Source: @naya_foriraq/76269).

sections.executive_summary: IDF reported striking over 135 Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon and a raid in Beirut's Shuwayfat area. Iran launched a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, violating the cease‑fire, and deployed drones near the Strait of Hormuz. An Israeli missile killed a Palestinian girl in Gaza, underscoring civilian risk.

points: Iran launched a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, breaching the cease‑fire, hours after deploying five one‑way attack drones near the Strait of Hormuz, which were intercepted by Kuwaiti forces (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
Iranian officials warned of potential internal unrest due to economic pressure and alleged foreign sabotage, citing possible shortages and inflation (Source: @VahidOnline/75742).
Iran announced new sanctions on a U.S.-linked Iranian authority allegedly responsible for ship movements in the Persian Gulf (Source: @lelotsenzura/92275).
Iranian Revolutionary Guard claimed control over the Strait of Hormuz and warned of a decisive response to any disruption (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3114).

The IDF reported attacking more than 135 Hezbollah targets across Beka'a, the southern Lebanon front, and the Qasr al‑Dib area, including launch sites and a training camp (Source: @idf_telegram/23932).
Two Israeli soldiers were lightly wounded by Hezbollah anti‑tank fire in southern Lebanon and received medical evacuation (Source: @inon_yttach/8362).
An Israeli drone operator was killed by a drone‑borne explosive that entered Israel and detonated in the western Galilee (Source: @inon_yttach/8367).
Israeli forces carried out a strike in Beirut, reported to have hit the Shuwayfat district south of the capital (Source: @manniefabian/58303).
A Palestinian girl in Gaza was killed when an Israeli missile struck her building, resulting in 10 deaths and dozens of injuries (Source: @presstv/191707).
UN reports indicated Israeli airstrikes in Gaza's Nabatia area caused civilian casualties, including women and children (Source: @naya_foriraq/76274).
Israeli security forces arrested five suspected militants planning attacks in the West Bank, including a Hamas‑linked operative in Kfar Sde (Source: @idf_telegram/23919).
Multiple alerts were activated for hostile aircraft intrusion over the Zeraim and Shomra areas, though no injuries were reported (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/362585).
Hezbollah anti‑tank fire injured two Israeli soldiers in southern Lebanon, prompting medical evacuation (Source: @inon_yttach/8362).
IDF operations targeted over 135 Hezbollah sites, including launch positions and a training camp in the Beka'a region (Source: @idf_telegram/23932).
Israeli airstrike in Beirut was reported to have hit the Shuwayfat area, indicating cross‑border retaliation (Source: @manniefabian/58303).
Hezbollah launched multiple rockets toward Israeli positions, prompting IDF air defense interceptions (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/362585).
Israeli forces advanced near Tel al‑Jala in the Quneitra countryside of southern Syria (Source: @naya_foriraq/76269).
Hezbollah‑linked aerial activity was observed over the Bekaa Valley, with reports of a warplane at medium altitude (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/362605).
No casualties were reported from recent alerts in the Yiftah and Hermon areas, though a missile was launched at a dummy target (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/362585).
US Navy activity was noted near the region, according to a Persian‑language tweet (Source: @shin_persian/6266).
Iran launched a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, violating the cease‑fire, after earlier sending five drones near the Strait of Hormuz (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
Kuwaiti air defense systems engaged and intercepted the Iranian missile and drones, reporting successful neutralization (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
Kuwait’s air defense faced multiple missile and drone threats, prompting heightened alert status (Source: @almogboker78/17172).
Iranian officials warned of decisive response to any disruption of the Strait of Hormuz, a key Gulf shipping lane (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3114).

key_developments: IDF struck over 135 Hezbollah targets across southern Lebanon, including launch sites and a training camp, within the last 24 hours (Source: @idf_telegram/23932).
Iran fired a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, breaching the cease‑fire, after earlier launching five drones near the Strait of Hormuz (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
An Israeli missile killed a Palestinian girl in Gaza, causing 10 deaths and dozens of injuries (Source: @presstv/191707).
Two Israeli soldiers were lightly wounded by Hezbollah anti‑tank fire in southern Lebanon (Source: @inon_yttach/8362).
Israeli forces conducted a strike in Beirut’s Shuwayfat area south of the capital (Source: @manniefabian/58303).
Israeli troops entered near Tel al‑Jala in southern Syria’s Quneitra countryside (Source: @naya_foriraq/76269).
Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted the Iranian ballistic missile and drones, reporting successful neutralization (Source: @naya_foriraq/76277).
sections.threat_assessment: Hezbollah continues to engage Israeli forces with anti‑tank weapons, indicating sustained low‑intensity conflict along the Lebanon border. Iran's missile launch toward Kuwait and drone deployments near the Strait of Hormuz demonstrate a willingness to breach cease‑fire agreements and project power in the Gulf, raising the risk of broader escalation. Israeli air operations in Beirut and Gaza suggest a pattern of cross‑border retaliation and heightened civilian risk.
sections.regional_response: Kuwait activated its air defense network to intercept Iranian missiles and drones, signaling readiness to defend its airspace. The United Nations has called for investigations into civilian casualties in Gaza, reflecting international concern over the conflict's humanitarian impact. Iran faces new U.S. sanctions targeting entities involved in Persian Gulf shipping, indicating increased economic pressure from the West.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Iranian missile trajectories and drone flight paths is critical to anticipate further violations of the Gulf cease‑fire. Continued surveillance of Hezbollah artillery and anti‑tank activity along the Lebanon frontier is needed to assess escalation potential. Israeli strike patterns in Beirut and Gaza should be tracked for indications of broader strategic objectives and possible retaliation cycles.
